form.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording four minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when third (24.74) over 435m at this track. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th over 400m at Warragul beaten 5.5 lengths (22.86) behind Burn Along in a Mix 3/4 on April 3. Comes through a good form race. Looks a top chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 4th over 400m at Warragul beaten 5.5 lengths (22.86) behind Burn Along in a Mix 3/4 on April 3. Comes through a good form race. Looks a top chance.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (24.56) at this track in a Free For All, finishing fourth and beaten 6 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and three places from eight starts. Suited here and expected to run well.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (24.76) at this track in a Free For All, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Will need some luck to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (24.76) at this track in a Free For All, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Strong performance showing plenty of speed to score by 2.75 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at Warragul, clocking an excellent 22.52 for the 400m trip. Should be in this for a long way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance showing plenty of speed to score by 2.75 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at Warragul, clocking an excellent 22.52 for the 400m trip. Should be in this for a long way.

form.formComment: Finished off last campaign with a win (28.86) over 510m at this track seven months ago. Tough draw and others have better claims.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished off last campaign with a win (28.86) over 510m at this track seven months ago. Tough draw and others have better claims.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Warragul over 400m. Last start finished 3rd on April 5 over 435m at this track behind Matilda Rose beaten 2.5 lengths (24.74) in a Grade 5. Has been around the mark at his last couple and should make his presence felt.

form.formComment: Should get a clear run from the wide draw. Wasn't impressive last start but does have a great record at this track and distance, must be included.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fifth over 435m at this track. This looks too tough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and fell approaching first turn.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (24.54) at big odds over 435m at this track. Needs to find best form to feature.
